description: AGN Toolmaker registry. Agents can register new tools via agn_tool_register MCP tool.

system_status.description: Get AGN2.0 system lifecycle status as JSON
system_status.author: system

health_check_quick.description: Run a quick system health check (CPU, disk, SSOT, daemons)
health_check_quick.author: system

test_suite.description: Run the AGN test suite (takes ~10 minutes)
test_suite.author: system

command: import json; from pathlib import Path; d=Path('ssot/tasks'); tasks=[json.loads(f.read_text()) for f in d.glob('*.json')] if d.is_dir() else []; counts={}; [counts.__setitem__(t.get('status','?'), counts.get(t.get('status','?'),0)+1) for t in tasks]; print(json.dumps({'total':len(tasks),'by_status':counts}, indent=2))
ssot_summary.author: system

memory_index.description: Re-index all memory records into ChromaDB vector store
memory_index.author: system

external_toolbox_list.description: List curated external toolbox mounts available to AGN
external_toolbox_list.author: system

external_toolbox_status.description: Check readiness of curated external toolbox mounts
external_toolbox_status.author: system

external_toolbox_show.description: Show one curated external toolbox mount by name. Pass the name as an extra arg.
external_toolbox_show.author: system

cognitive_overlays_list.description: List AGN cognitive overlays for coding, evaluation, writing, and memory-aware startup
cognitive_overlays_list.author: system

cognitive_overlays_recommend.description: Recommend AGN cognitive overlays for a task summary. Pass --task-summary as extra args.
cognitive_overlays_recommend.author: system

browser_use_wrapper_run.description: Run the controlled browser-use wrapper. Pass --url and optional --artifact-stem as extra args.
browser_use_wrapper_run.author: system

browser_use_wrapper_rollback.description: Rollback a browser-use wrapper session. Pass --session as an extra arg.
browser_use_wrapper_rollback.author: system

hindsight_wrapper_run.description: Run the controlled hindsight wrapper. Defaults to local mock smoke mode; pass provider/model flags for live providers when available.
hindsight_wrapper_run.author: system

hindsight_wrapper_rollback.description: Rollback a hindsight wrapper profile. Pass --profile as an extra arg.
hindsight_wrapper_rollback.author: system

promptfoo_wrapper_run.description: Run the controlled promptfoo wrapper. Pass --config or smoke-test args as extra flags.
promptfoo_wrapper_run.author: system

promptfoo_wrapper_rollback.description: Remove promptfoo wrapper-generated config/log artifacts. Pass --artifact-stem as an extra arg.
promptfoo_wrapper_rollback.author: system
